items: Do come with an open mind
Do come with an empty stomach (2-3 hours after your last meal)
Do bring your own Yoga mat if you wish to do so (I have some available to use and also sell mats)
Do bring some water for yourself
Do come 5 – 10 minutes before class starts to have time to settle down
Do turn your cell phone off during class
Do ask questions to help you understand my teaching
Do let me know if there are any changes to your medical or physical situation
Do work within your own limits, keeping yourself safe
Do be quiet before and during class. Keeping voices quiet before class and ceasing conversation during class helps you and everyone to get the most out of the Yoga practice.
Do let your friends know how you’re enjoying Yoga!
